title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the ombudsmen office and framework for investigating complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and local organizations. Defines investigative powers, complaint procedures, secrecy obligations, and coordination with other oversight bodies.
